name: ISO 19650 — BIM Information Management (KSA adoption)
regulator: Adopted by NEOM, RCJY, Saudi Aramco, RCRC, and the Ministry of Investment for mega-projects.
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check BIM federations against ISO 19650-1/-2/-5 — Exchange Information Requirements (EIR) attached, BIM Execution Plan (BEP) version-controlled, Common Data Environment (CDE) configured with WIP / Shared / Published / Archive states, MIDP (Master Information Delivery Plan) and TIDP (Task Information Delivery Plans) present, and ISO 19650-5 security triage for sensitive Aramco / NEOM / military-adjacent assets.
description_ar: تفعيل قواعد التحقق لمستويات معلومات BIM وفق ISO 19650 — متطلبات تبادل المعلومات EIR، خطة تنفيذ BIM، بيئة البيانات المشتركة CDE.
